title: Eternity
overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

title: Forget Me Not
overview: Drawn together by a spontaneous encounter at lake Balaton, Alex and Domi spend an unforgettable night sharing laughter, secrets, and a spark of romance. Months later, Alex returns to Hungary, hoping to take the next step on his long distance relationship with Domi, but finds that navigating love across cultural differences and personal insecurities can be a bittersweet experience.

title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
overview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?

title: The Four Gates of Death
overview: A graveyard rendezvous that isn’t just about love, but about fulfilling a promise – and facing its consequences.  A family weekend that digs up buried secrets – secrets that perhaps should have stayed underground forever.  A legendary VHS tape, worth killing for – or maybe someone already has.  And a childhood tale that proves, years later: sometimes the scariest things are the ones we believed were true as kids.  From Horrorszkóp and Cruel World Team comes four dark and unsettling stories in this chilling horror anthology.  Each one steeped in the shadow of death, human weakness, and the grim truth that the ending is never what you expect.  Four stories. Four secrets. Four inevitable ends.

title: Tito’s Children
overview: Children of Tito is a documentary about ethnic Hungarian women in Vojvodina during the 90s Balkan Wars, offering personal stories of life under Tito, Yugoslavia's collapse, and the 1999 NATO bombing.

title: For a Pure Moment
overview: Tibor lives happily in his village with his wife. At least that's what he thinks. One day a series of strange occurrences begin to unfold.

title: The Muppet Show
overview: Music, comedy, and a whole lot of chaos is bound to ensue when The Muppets once again take the stage of the original Muppet Theatre with their very special guest, Sabrina Carpenter!

title: Dreamland Awaits
overview: Seasoned but troubled detective Josh has spent twenty years confronting life's darkest corners, shaping him into a hardened man. Now, he faces his greatest challenge: his wife and two daughters have been kidnapped by a mysterious figure. To save them, Josh must follow the stranger's commands, move into an empty house, remain unnoticed, and complete a series of tasks. The house, a gateway to a dark dimension, begins to consume the reality around Josh, driving him toward insanity. As he navigates this perilous journey, he confronts a terror even more frightening—his own dark side.

title: Égigérő
overview: Villő is spending their summer in isolation, dissociating and depressed. When they dream about their childhood by a forest lake and with a tree decorated with ribbons, they set off on a journey to find the place.

title: Return to Silent Hill
overview: When James receives a mysterious letter from his lost love Mary, he is drawn to Silent Hill—a once-familiar town now consumed by darkness. As he searches for her, James faces monstrous creatures and unravels a terrifying truth that will push him to the edge of his sanity.

title: Father Mother Sister Brother
overview: Estranged siblings reunite after years apart, forced to confront unresolved tensions and reevaluate their strained relationships with their emotionally distant parents.

title: The History of Sound
overview: In 1917, two young music students attending the Boston Conservatory bond over a mutual love of folk music. They reconnect a few years later, embarking on a song-collecting trip in the backwaters of Maine.

title: Feels Like Home
overview: Rita, an ordinary, but lonely woman is kidnapped. Her captors are the Árpáds; they claim she is not called Rita but Szilvi, a runaway from their family. Rita eventually understands that the only way out is in - to escape she must impersonate Szilvi. The more she becomes the lost girl the more she finds out about the family - and understands that her life is on the line.

title: Theatre from Mud
overview: On the 45th anniversary of the Grange Theatre in Vojvodina, its two legendary founders - director György Hernyák and actor Frigyes Kovács - have reunited. It was a unique occasion seeing these two masters create art under the open sky once again. Through this rehearsal process, the documentary draws a vivid portrait of the Grange Theatre’s past and present, the community built around it, and the unique energy that binds Vojvodina Hungarian identity with the troupe’s history. The film is not merely a retrospective; it reveals how liberating and life-affirming theater-making can be, and how the joy of free creation remains indispensable today.

title: Ozora Festival 2025
overview: The 2025 Ozora movie is a poetic journey that begins with the instincts and spirit animals within us, moving through mindfulness to return to tribal connection. Guided by music and shared intention, we meet through playfulness and dance, reconnecting with ancient rituals and continue to weave the fabric of life together.

title: Above Budapest
overview: In a cafe in Budapest, two former angels, Uriel and Theliel, reunite after thirty five years. Their initial tension melts away as they share drinks and reminisce about their angelic past and their choice to become mortal. Excited to relive their youthful glory, they embark on a night of philosophical discussions about existence, unraveling the bittersweet reason for their separation: a girl named Gabriella.

title: Books Are Our Weapons
overview: A socially committed student commune gathers in its yearly camp to welcome new members, debate on feminism, culture critique and direct democracy, but also sit by the fireplace and sing songs of the movement.

title: Lakásavató
overview: Having recently moved back home, a young couple hosts their high school friends in their new apartment.

title: immortals
overview: After the death of his sister, the only way Zoli can financially support his orphaned niece and severely ill nephew is through illegal online challenges.

title: State of Fear
overview: As São Paulo erupts in an unprecedented wave of violence, a lawyer with underworld ties must strike a deal with the police to rescue her kidnapped niece.

title: "Wuthering Heights"
overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

title: Die My Love
overview: After inheriting a remote Montana house, Jackson moves there from New York with his partner Grace, and the couple soon welcome a child. As Jackson becomes increasingly absent and rural isolation sets in, Grace struggles with loneliness, creative frustration, and unresolved emotional wounds. What begins as an attempt at renewal gradually turns into an intense psychological descent, placing strain on their relationship and exposing the fragile balance between love, identity, and motherhood.

title: The Strangers: Chapter 3
overview: Tethered by a frightening conclusion, Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable, unforgiving collision course — a showdown that proves they’re far from strangers now.

title: Love, Forgotten
overview: Eszter is a successful actress who unexpectedly suffers an accident and suffers amnesia. It turns out that reality has been mixed up in her head: she believes that she lives in the nineties, is a hairdresser and is searching for the One.

title: The Singers
overview: An impromptu singing contest at a dive bar turns a lonely night into a soul-baring moment of shared harmony.

title: Joe's College Road Trip
overview: To teach his sheltered grandson about the real world, Madea's foul-mouthed brother Joe takes the college-bound teen on a raucous cross-country road trip.

title: The Trap
overview: Viktor Orbán was given a rare opportunity in 2010. He won a supermajority in parliament, giving him a strong mandate to put Hungary on a path to development.  He also received external assistance for this. The global economy boomed in the 2010s, and Hungary received an unprecedented amount of funding from the European Union, on a scale unseen in over a century.  What did Viktor Orbán do with these unprecedented opportunities? To what extent did he keep the promises he made 16 years ago?  This film tells that story.

title: The Invention Movie
overview: Two Inventors struggle to survive in a job crisis, inspiring them build an anthropomorphic robot to help service them. Meanwhile, their greedy penthouse owner tries to take advantage of them, overpricing their basic needs.

title: Crime 101
overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

title: Cold Storage
overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.

title: Stitch Head
overview: Stitch Head was the first creature brought to 'almost life' by mad professor Erasmus. In the years since, he’s become nursemaid to the master’s ever-growing menagerie of neglected creatures, tasked with teaching them to suppress their 'inner monster' and hide out in the castle — away from prying eyes and itchy pitchfork fingers, of the village mob in the valley below. But when grubby circus impresario Fulbert Freakfinder arrives offering Stitch Head a starring role in his freak show, our hero is tempted by the promise of love and acceptance.

title: The Swedish Connection
overview: Swedish Foreign Ministry bureaucrat Gösta Engzell, overlooked during WWII, rescued thousands while turning supposedly neutral Sweden into a moral force. His efforts challenged the status quo and left a lasting humanitarian legacy.

title: Kurtág Fragments
overview: Renowned composer György Kurtág's journey through the key places and collaborations that shaped his work, capturing the transformation of emotions into music with world-class musicians in a cinematic exploration of his musical world.

title: Firebreak
overview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

title: Pavane
overview: Three lonely strangers meet at their department store jobs and find solace in each other's company while they explore connection and the nature of love.

title: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane
overview: In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.

title: IURIMA – A Tale of Three Fishermen
overview: Three starving fishermen encounter something unexpected on a remote island in the 1890's. A visual mystery story with horror elements.

title: Continuance
overview: A serial killer, his eccentric wife, and their house-keeper want to hide from society before an impending economic collapse, but first they must go on one last supply run.

title: Scream 7
overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

title: Mambo Maternica
overview: An adoption, an insemination, an abortion. Three women in three European cities struggle through a day, making one of the hardest decisions in their lives. An up-to-date observation of women’s choices on the verge of motherhood.

title: In the Blink of an Eye
overview: Three storylines, spanning thousands of years, intersect and reflect on hope, connection, and the circle of life.

title: Accused
overview: When a celebrated queer doctor in London is accused of sexual misconduct, her life unravels. Now under a storm of suspicion and scrutiny, her marriage fractures and the truth blurs. Her wife must decide whether to walk away, or fight for the woman the world is turning against.
